##LOCALITY=Shinkolobwe mine, Zaire

##SOURCE=Luiz Menezes, from Vincent Bourgoin
##DESCRIPTION=Pale yellow bladed crystals associated with orange wölsendorfite

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
